description_long: This is a pair of rectangular glasses with a bold, angular frame that appears to be made of a solid material. The frame is thick and features a deep, straight brow line, giving it a modern and assertive look. The lenses are large and flat, with one lens showing a visible crack, suggesting damage or wear. The temples are straight and robust, extending back in a parallel fashion, and the hinges are not visibly detailed. The bridge is a simple, flat connector that maintains the geometric style of the frame. The overall design is utilitarian with no visible embellishments or branding, making it suitable for everyday urban use.
description: Rectangular glasses with a thick, angular frame and large, flat lenses, one of which is cracked. The design is bold and modern, with straight temples and a simple bridge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular lenses, thick frame, and a visible crack on the left lens.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, robust temple and the thickness of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inner side of the frame and the cracked lens more clearly.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other temple and the overall symmetry of the frame.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with thick, straight lines and a bold, angular profile. The temples are straight and robust, matching the geometric style of the front. No decorative elements or embellishments are present.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are clear and untinted, with a neutral, transparent appearance. One lens has a visible crack, but there is no coloration or gradient effect.
attribute_bridge_style: Simple, flat bridge that directly connects the two lenses in a straight line, with no curvature or additional support features.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight, thick, and unadorned, with a consistent width and no visible patterns, engravings, or decorative elements.
